name: Schinkenfleckerln (Ham and Noodle Casserole)
recipeIngredient: 5 oz Boiled ham, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a small mixing bowl, combine milk, egg yolk, 2 1/2 teaspoons margarine, and pepper. Mix thoroughly.
3. Add ham and noodles, stirring well to combine.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the egg white with salt until stiff but not dry. Gently fold into the noodle mixture.
5. Grease a 2-cup casserole dish with remaining margarine.
6. Spoon the noodle mixture into the casserole dish.
7. Bake until browned on top, for 45 to 50 minutes.
8. Makes 2 servings.
